title: [FIRRTL] Lower Vectors in LowerTypes
body:
Currently, FIRRTL Dialect's lower types pass only supports bundles and not vectors. Add support for this.

Consider:

```scala
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    input a: UInt<1>[2]
    output b: UInt<1>[2]

    b <= a
```

Currently, CIRCT just won't lower these. With the Scala FIRRTL Compiler, these are blown out into:

```verilog
module Foo(
  input   a_0,
  input   a_1,
  output  b_0,
  output  b_1
);
  assign b_0 = a_0;
  assign b_1 = a_1;
endmodule
```
